backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the PUNJABI BITES app, managing menu items (CRUD), user profiles, and UPI payment settings with role-based access control (admin/user) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—fixing the CartSidebar Pay Now button visibility and auditing PaymentPage UPI settings fallback—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, page, hook, and context in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors, radius, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the PUNJABI BITES React app, setting viewport meta, the page title, and mounting the Vite/React entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with four routes (/, /admin, /payment, /receipt), wraps the app in CartProvider and ErrorBoundary, and renders a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI shown to unauthenticated or non-admin users, offering a login button (with loading state) and a link back to the menu.
frontend/src/components/CartSidebar.tsx: Sliding cart panel with item quantity controls, UPI deep-link Pay Now button (mobile-aware), payment confirmation flow, and a floating cart button with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based ErrorBoundary that catches unhandled render errors and displays a branded fallback UI with the error message and a page reload button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the brand name, copyright year, and a referral link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with the Punjabi Bites logo, an admin panel link (shown only to confirmed admins), and an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple full-height page wrapper that composes Header, a flex-growing main content area, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemCard.tsx: Displays a single menu item card with its name, price, category emoji, description, availability badge, and an add-to-cart button that tracks current cart quantity.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx: React Hook Form-based form for creating or editing a menu item, supporting name, description, price, category, and image URL fields with add/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/PresetImagePicke: Intentionally empty placeholder component not used in Version 2.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (items, quantities, totals) with add, remove, update, and clear operations backed by local useState.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, persisting identity across reloads and exposing login/clear/status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching menu items, admin status, and UPI settings, plus mutations for adding, updating, deleting, toggling menu items, and updating UPI settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm South Asian (saffron/cream/deep-red) CSS custom property palette for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing menu items (add, edit, delete, toggle availability) and UPI payment settings, with access control based on the caller's admin status.
frontend/src/pages/MenuDisplay.tsx: Public menu page that fetches and displays menu items grouped by category in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error retry, and a cart sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceiptPage.tsx: Order confirmation/receipt page that reads order data from sessionStorage, clears the cart, and displays a styled receipt with items, totals, and order metadata.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page that loads UPI settings, builds a UPI deep link/QR code for the cart total, and handles loading, error, and unavailable states before navigating to the receipt page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Punjabi Bites frontend, defining brand colors (saffron, deepRed, cream), custom fonts, shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes with dark mode and plugin support.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Punjabi Bites tracking known issues and existing fix features, specifically addressing the Pay Now button not displaying in CartSidebar on mobile and a UPI settings fallback on PaymentPage.
